https://github.com/ScottLogic/sl-tech-ca.description: Mapping an organisations technology emissions using the Tech Carbon Standard

items.name: CarbonDB
items.description: CarbonDB collects and consolidates energy usage data from multiple sources within a company, providing a unified view of energy consumption. It accurately converts energy usage into carbon emissions, enabling precise tracking of a company's carbon footprint.

items.name: fruggr
items.description: fruggr is a platform for collecting, managing and optimizing the environmental footprint of your cloud & on-prem infrastructure, digital workplaces, IT assets, websites, applications and more.

items.name: Sopht
items.description: Sopht is a platform for collecting, managing and optimizing the environmental footprint of your cloud & on-prem infrastructure, digital workplaces, IT assets, websites, applications and more.

items.name: Resilio Tech
items.description: Resilio Tech is a solution for assessing the environmental footprint of your digital products and services, whether it is an information system, website, or satellite.

items.name: Verdikt
items.description: Verdikt is a platform for assessing your sustainable IT maturity and track its performance.

items.name: Aguaro
items.description: Aguaro offers SaaS solutions integrated with ServiceNow to help companies automate the management of their environmental impact and reduce their carbon footprint. It streamlines hardware inventory retrieval and presents the data through intuitive dashboards.

items.name: Antarctica
items.description: Antarctica is a real time observability platform for monitoring the carbon emissions of your on-premise and cloud infrastructure, IT hardware assets and websites. It can also provide optimization recommendations.

items.name: Technology Carbon Estimator
items.description: The Technology Carbon Estimator is designed to give a high-level overview of the possible areas of carbon impact within your IT estate. The estimations are framed within the "Technology Carbon Standard", a model proposed by Scott Logic, designed to help you map out, measure and improve the environmental impacts of your technology.
